n, a, b = list(map(int, input().split()))
arr = [list(map(int, input().split())) for _ in range(n)]
arr.sort(key=lambda x: x[1])
sum_dmg = sum(i[1] for i in arr)
sum_hp = sum(i[0] for i in arr)
for i in range(n - 1, -1, -1):
    if a > 0:
        a -= 1
        sum_dmg += arr[i][0]
    elif b > 0:
        b -= 1
        sum_dmg += arr[i][0]
    else:
        break
print(sum_dmg)
